chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition. No.D-462 of 2021. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ Before: Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah, Mr. Justice Shamsuddin Abbasi, 01. For orders on office objection “A”. 02. For maintainability of main case. 09.11.2021 Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. Advocate General Sindh. = * = * = * = * = * = It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioner that the petitioner was appointed as Naib Qasid in Health Department, Jacobabad, but now his salary is not being released by the officials concerned, therefore, they be directed to release his salary. Contrary to this, it is contended by learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh, that as per comments filed by the District Health Officer, Jacobabad that the appointment order and service book of the petitioner are fake and bogus. No bogus document could create a right to be safeguarded by this Court. The appointment order and service book of the petitioner being fake or bogus involving factual controversy could even otherwise, not be resolved by this Court, in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition is dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E
